items.title: Retry with exponential backoff
items.description: A while loop with break/continue wraps flaky model API calls, retrying a few times and sleeping longer between attempts before giving up.

items.title: Consuming a token/chunk stream
items.description: Streamed responses are iterated with a for loop, appending each chunk to the displayed answer as it arrives for a responsive UI.

items.title: Batch processing for embeddings/RAG
items.description: Loop over documents (often in fixed-size batches) to chunk, embed and index them, using enumerate to track progress.

items.title: Intent routing with match/case
items.description: A match statement dispatches a parsed user intent (search, summarize, translate, ...) to the right handler, with case _ catching anything unrecognized.

items.title: Early validation with guard clauses
items.description: Guard clauses reject empty prompts, out-of-range temperatures or missing API keys at the top of a function, keeping the main path clean.
